name: Gospels in 30 Days
description: Read all four accounts of Jesus' life in one month. See how Matthew, Mark, Luke, and John each tell the story differently.

name: Paul's Letters in 30 Days
description: Read all 13 of Paul's letters in a month. From the theological depth of Romans to the personal warmth of Philemon.

name: Psalms & Proverbs
description: 60 days of poetry, prayer, and practical wisdom. The Psalms cover every human emotion; Proverbs offers timeless life advice.

name: Pentateuch in 60 Days
description: The first five books of Moses: creation, the flood, the patriarchs, the exodus, and the law. The foundation of the entire Bible.

name: New Testament in 90 Days
description: Read through the entire New Testament in three months. Covers the Gospels, Acts, all the letters, and Revelation.

name: Wisdom Books in 90 Days
description: Dive into the poetry and wisdom of the Bible: Job, Psalms, Proverbs, Ecclesiastes, and Song of Solomon. Rich in practical life guidance.

name: Prophets in 90 Days
description: Journey through all 17 prophetic books from Isaiah to Malachi. Hear God's warnings, promises, and the hope that points toward the Messiah.

name: Gospels & Acts in 90 Days
description: Take your time with the life of Jesus through all four perspectives, then follow the early church in Acts. About 1-2 chapters per day.

name: Bible in 90 Days
description: An intense sprint through the entire Bible with variety each day. Readings from OT history, poetry & prophets, and the New Testament keep every session fresh.

name: Bible in a Year
description: Read through all 66 books in one year with three readings per day: OT history, poetry & prophets, and the New Testament. Keeps each day varied and engaging.

name: Chronological in a Year
description: Read the Bible in roughly the order events happened. Starts with Genesis & Job, weaves Psalms with David's life, and prophets with their historical context.

name: New Testament in a Year
description: A gentle walk through the New Testament. Just one chapter most days — great for focusing deeply on Jesus' life and the early church.

name: Old Testament in a Year
description: Read through all 39 Old Testament books in a year. About 2-3 chapters per day covering history, poetry, prophecy, and law.

name: Bible in 2 Years
description: A relaxed pace through the entire Bible with daily variety. Each day pulls from OT history, poetry & prophets, and the New Testament so you never get stuck in one genre.

name: Bible in 3 Years
description: One chapter a day across three streams — OT narrative, OT poetry & prophets, and the New Testament. The most sustainable long-term plan with built-in variety.

name: Bible in 5 Years
description: Ultra-gentle pace with built-in rest days. Readings rotate through OT history, poetry & prophets, and the New Testament for variety each week.
